title: Lee Jae Myung becomes president of South Korea
fact: Lee Jae Myung is a South Korean politician and lawyer who is serving as the 14th president of South Korea since 2025.

title: Yoon Suk Yeol becomes president of South Korea
fact: Yoon Suk Yeol is a South Korean politician who served as the 13th president of South Korea from 2022 until his removal from office in 2025.

title: Syngman Rhee becomes president of South Korea
fact: Syngman Rhee, also known by his art name Unam, was a South Korean politician who served as the first president of South Korea from 1948 until his resignation in 1960.

title: Park Chung-hee becomes president of South Korea
fact: Park Chung Hee was a South Korean politician and army officer who served as the third president of South Korea from 1962 after he seized power in the May 16 coup of 1961 until his assassination in 1979.

title: Park Geun-hye becomes president of South Korea
fact: Park Geun-hye is a South Korean politician who served as the 11th president of South Korea from 2013 until her removal from office in 2017.

title: Moon Jae-in becomes president of South Korea
fact: Moon Jae-in is a South Korean politician and lawyer who served as the 12th president of South Korea from 2017 to 2022.

title: Chun Doo-hwan becomes president of South Korea
fact: Chun Doo-hwan was a South Korean army general who served as the fifth president of South Korea from 1980 to 1988.

title: Kim Dae-jung becomes president of South Korea
fact: Kim Dae-jung was a South Korean politician, activist and statesman who served as the eighth president of South Korea from 1998 to 2003.

title: Roh Moo-hyun becomes president of South Korea
fact: Roh Moo-hyun was a South Korean politician and lawyer who served as the ninth president of South Korea from 2003 to 2008.

title: Lee Myung-bak becomes president of South Korea
fact: Lee Myung-bak, often referred to by his initials MB, is a South Korean politician and business executive who served as the tenth president of South Korea from 2008 to 2013.

title: Roh Tae-woo becomes president of South Korea
fact: Roh Tae-woo was a South Korean army general and politician who served as the sixth president of South Korea from 1988 to 1993.

title: Kim Young-sam becomes president of South Korea
fact: Kim Young-sam, also known by his initials YS, was a South Korean politician who served as the seventh president of South Korea from 1993 to 1998.

title: Yun Po-sun becomes president of South Korea
fact: Yun Po-sun was a South Korean politician and activist who served as the second president of South Korea from 1960 to 1962.
